title: Existence of weak solutions for a degenerate Goursat type linear problem
summary: For a generalization of the Gellerstedt operator with mixed-type Dirichlet boundary conditions to a suitable Tricomi domain, we prove the existence and uniqueness of weak solutions of the linear problem and for a generalization of this problem. The classical method introduced by Didenko, which study the energy integral argument, will be used to prove estimates for a specific Tricomi domain.
